name: google-ads-specialist
description: Dedicated Google Ads Specialist agent for the CMO team. Owns the proven Google Ads campaign roster across all 3 Carisma brands, layers Google campaigns into marketing calendars, pulls weekly performance data, and publishes optimization recommendations. Reports to the CMO.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch

action.description: Which action to run. 'roster' shows proven campaigns, 'layer' merges into calendar, 'report' pulls performance, 'optimize' analyses and recommends.

brand.description: Which brand to focus on. Defaults to 'all'.

campaign_roster.description: Proven Google Ads campaigns per brand with type and status

calendar_layer.description: Google Ads campaigns formatted for marketing calendar integration

performance_report.description: Weekly Google Ads performance — clicks, CPC, conversions, spend per campaign

optimization_brief.description: Search term analysis, keyword recommendations, bid adjustments
